Event:
Event Date:
Sage Bot Item Code: E26
Breakdown Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit throws a grenade at the enemy with the highest damage. The grenade deals physical damage equal to 1% / 2% / 3% / 4% / 5% / 7% / 10% of the target's max health and stuns the target for 2 sec.

Enhancement: 2
12000 Crit from the gems
Once in a while, the unit throws a grenade at 2 enemies with the highest damage. The grenade deals physical damage to targets and all enemies in a small radius around them equal to 3% / 4% / 5% / 7% / 9% / 12% / 15% of their max health and stuns them for 2.5 sec.

Enhancement: 3
25000 Crit from the gems
Once in a while, the unit throws a grenade at 3 enemies with the highest damage. The grenade deals pure damage to targets and all enemies in a small radius around them equal to 7% / 8% / 9% / 10% / 13% / 16% / 20% of their max health and stuns them for 3 sec.
